name: Sleeping Dragon
short_description: Explore charming diorama worlds in the Dream Lands. As Hiru, solve perspective puzzles, collect totems that hold secrets, and find the Sleeping Dragon’s lost memories. A relaxing 3D low-poly adventure filled with mysteries and hidden collectibles.
detailed_description:
Awaken the memories of a forgotten world.

Sleeping Dragon is a cozy puzzle adventure set in vibrant diorama levels, blending the whimsical charm of animes with clean, low-poly aesthetics.

Take on the role of Hiru, a young traveler lost in the Dream Lands. To find your way home, you must explore the realm of the Great Sleeping Dragon. With the guidance of your quirky companion, the Cuckoo Cucko-Peep, you’ll navigate floating islands, solve perspective-based puzzles, and recover the 7 magic totems that hold the dragon’s lost memories.

Why does the Dragon sleep? And what secrets do its memories hold?

Key Features:

  • Handcrafted Dioramas: Explore intricate 3D worlds filled with secrets hidden around every corner.

  • Whimsical Art Style: A relaxing visual experience inspired by classic anime aesthetics and cozy vibes.

  • Tactile Puzzles: Rotate the environment and interact with the world to find hidden paths and collectibles.

  • A Relaxing Journey: Experience a stress-free adventure focused on exploration, discovery, and atmosphere.

reviews.review_text: Its ok. The game has a lot of potential, but it lacks direction.  I never really knew what I was supposed to be doing.  Also, I thought the game was a single level because upon level completion I was told "thanks for playing" and brought to the main menu.  It took me a while to find the level select screen and find subsequent levels.  It really needs some brushing up, but will be a solid puzzle platformer if some helpful adjustments are made.
